---
title: "mur_v41_downloader_dailyproc.sh"
toc: false
page-layout: full
number-sections: false
---

[← Back to workflow](../../mur-sst.html)

Daily MUR v4.1 download and processing driver.

::: {.code-shell}

```{.bash}
{{< include ../../workflows/mur-daily-workflows/scripts/mur_v41_downloader_dailyproc.sh >}}
```

:::
